info.title: LiveChat API
info.description: API documentation for the LiveChat platform

tags.name: Gifts
tags.description: Virtual Gifting, transfers, history, and Admin analytics

tags.name: Banners
tags.description: Banner Section Management (Admin CRUD and User Side)

tags.name: Wishlist
tags.description: Wishlist management for saving and listing favorite listeners

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Agora audio/video call session management and RTC token generation

tags.name: XP
tags.description: XP, Level Progression, Rewards, Leaderboard, and Admin configs

tags.name: Sticker Categories
tags.description: Sticker category management — user listing and admin CRUD

tags.name: Stickers
tags.description: Sticker management — user listing with filters and admin CRUD

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Listener reviews and ratings by customers

tags.name: Feedback
tags.description: Application feedback — any user submits, admin moderates

post.summary: Admin login via email and password
Guest login with age verification and device ID
post.description: Creates a permanent guest account on first call. On subsequent calls with the same deviceId, restores the existing session. User must be 18+.

deviceId.description: Unique device identifier generated by the client (UUID or similar)

dateOfBirth.description: User's date of birth for 18+ age verification (ISO 8601)

200.description: Guest account created or session restored

403.description: User is under 18 or account is blocked

post.summary: Link phone number to guest account
post.description: Verifies OTP and permanently links a phone number to the guest account, upgrading it to a full account. Request OTP first via POST /auth/request-otp.

409.description: Phone number already linked to another account

introVideo.description: Upload intro video file (MP4, MOV, WebM up to 50MB)

interests.description: Array of strings representing listener interests

get.summary: Get all users with filters and pagination (admin)

post.summary: Create a new Admin or Sub-Admin (admin)

roleId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the assigned Role

get.summary: Get current user's coin transaction history
Get current user's payment transaction history

post.summary: Create a Coin Pack Purchase Order

get.summary: List and search all user wallets (Admin)
List all coin transactions across the system (Admin)
List all payment transactions across the system (Admin)

post.summary: Manually credit or debit user coins (Admin)

post.description: Follow a listener. Idempotent — duplicate follows are silently acknowledged without error.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener to follow

400.description: Cannot follow yourself / Can only follow listeners

delete.description: Unfollow a listener. Returns error if not currently following.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener to unfollow

400.description: You are not following this listener

get.description: Get paginated list of listeners the current user is following, with populated listener profile data.
Get paginated list of listeners the current user has marked as favourite (subset of following list).
Get paginated list of users following a specific listener.

parameters.name: listenerId
parameters.description: The User ObjectId of the listener

get.summary: Get follow counts for a user
get.description: Get follower count, following count, and whether the user is a listener. Reads from denormalized fields for O(1) performance.
Check if the current authenticated user follows a specific listener and whether they are marked as favourite.

patch.description: Toggle a followed listener as favourite/not favourite. Must already be following the listener.

400.description: You must follow this listener before marking as favourite

get.description: Analytics endpoint — returns listeners sorted by follower count in descending order.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top listeners to return

get.description: Retrieve the main company details, links, policy documents, and logos. Publicly accessible.
List all company profiles with pagination.

post.description: Create a new company profile with custom settings, links, and policies.
Send a virtual gift to a listener (or by Admin to any user). Debits coins from sender and credits recipient.

400.description: Insufficient balance or invalid recipient/role combination

get.description: Returns stats including active gifts, total sent in last 7 days, and top 10 gifts by revenue.

get.summary: Check if a specific listener is in my wishlist
Get current user daily reward state and previews

put.summary: Update configurations for 7 days rewards cycle (Admin)
Update configurations for 4 weeks special gifts cycle (Admin)

200.description: 4 weeks special gift configurations updated successfully

post.summary: Open an unopened chest or gift from the user's inventory

200.description: Chest opened and coins granted successfully

get.summary: Get all active avatars (annotated with isUnlocked)

post.summary: Unlock a paid avatar by spending wallet coins
Set an unlocked (or free) avatar as profile image
post.description: Updates the authenticated user's profileImage to the selected avatar's image URL. The avatar must be FREE or already unlocked by the user.

parameters.name: avatarId
parameters.description: ID of the avatar to set as profile image

profileImage.description: URL of the new profile image

403.description: Avatar not unlocked by the user

post.summary: Initiate a new audio or video call session
post.description: Creates a CommunicationSession, sets the listener to BUSY, and returns a signed Agora RTC token plus channel info for the caller to join.

listenerId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target listener

400.description: Validation error (invalid mode, self-call, listener offline/busy, no rate set)

409.description: Caller already in an active session

get.summary: Get or refresh Agora RTC token for an active session
get.description: Returns a fresh Agora RTC token for the requesting user. The user must be a verified participant (caller or listener) of the given session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the active CommunicationSession

403.description: User is not a participant in this session

post.description: Ends the call, triggers final billing, resets listener availability, and cleans up Redis state.

sessionId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the session to end

400.description: Session already ended or does not exist

403.description: User is not authorised to end this session

post.description: Any authenticated user (CUSTOMER / LISTENER / ADMIN) can submit feedback about the app.

get.summary: Get a feedback by id (owner or admin)

put.summary: Update your feedback (owner, while status is OPEN)

post.summary: Create or update a review for a listener
post.description: Requires the customer to have at least one COMPLETED session with the listener. One review per user per listener (upsert).

400.description: No completed session with this listener

get.summary: Get paginated reviews for a listener

get.description: Users see only active categories (cached). Admins get all categories with full filter control.

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Admin only — filter by active status

get.summary: Get a sticker category by id

delete.description: Fails with 400 if any stickers still belong to the category.

patch.summary: Toggle a sticker category active status (Admin)

get.description: Users see only active stickers (cached). Admins get all stickers. Filter by category and search by name/tags.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by sticker name or tags

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Admin only — filter by active status

200.description: Stickers fetched successfully. For non-admin users each sticker includes `isUnlocked` (and `levelsToUnlock` for LEVEL stickers).

post.description: unlockType controls access: FREE (everyone), PAID (requires `price` coins, user unlocks via POST /stickers/{id}/unlock), LEVEL (auto-unlocks at `requiredLevel`).

price.description: Coin cost — required (>0) when unlockType is PAID

requiredLevel.description: Min user level — required (>=2) when unlockType is LEVEL

post.summary: Unlock (purchase) a PAID sticker with coins
post.description: Deducts the sticker's coin price from the user's wallet and adds it to their unlocked stickers. Fails for FREE stickers (no purchase needed) and LEVEL stickers (auto-unlock by level).

400.description: Free/level sticker, already unlocked, or insufficient balance

get.summary: Get current user's XP & level progression profile
Get paginated personal XP transaction log
Get my reward inventory (claimable level-up rewards)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter rewards by claim status. Omit for all.

post.summary: Claim a single reward from the inventory
post.description: Applies the reward to the user's account (coins, avatar, gift, badge) and marks it CLAIMED. Claiming is idempotent — an already-claimed reward returns 400.

400.description: Reward already claimed or not found

post.summary: Manually grant XP to a user (admin)
